title: Ketamine crisis: The party drug sold online with free perks - that's attracting children as young as 10
description: Sky News joins investigators infiltrating networks used by dealers. The hunt is a game of cat and mouse, driven by a Class B drug that is being taken in record numbers.
content:
In a dimly lit room in Manchester, a social media investigator is showing me just how easy it is to buy ketamine online.
He is one of two officers at Greater Manchester Police who have been specially trained to find the platforms, forums and sites be... [7074 chars]

title: Sara Pascoe says people who go through IVF 'should be so proud'
description: The comedian says she tries to be proud of her own experience of IVF by talking about it on stage.
content:
Sara Pascoe has said anyone who tries to conceive through IVF "should be so proud of themselves", explaining that it is "such a big thing to put your body through".
The 44-year-old comedian, who has previously spoken about her fertility issues, conce... [2293 chars]

title: ‘So awesome’: BTS fans on K-pop’s biggest comeback
description: Tens of thousands gathered in Seoul to show that, after a four-year hiatus, they had still kept a place for the band in a very changed world
content:
The Zubillaga family had come from Veracruz, Mexico. Julio and Miryam had brought their daughters, Renata, 15, and Fernanda, 11, as a gift, across 15 hours of flights to a city none of them had visited before.

title: UFC London: Movsar Evloev beats Lerone Murphy to crush title hopes
description: Movsar Evloev puts a huge dent in Lerone Murphy's featherweight title dream as the Russian secures a majority decision victory at UFC London.
content:
Movsar Evloev put a huge dent in Lerone Murphy's featherweight title dream as the Russian secured a majority decision victory at UFC London.

title: Sombr stopped a show over fan safety
description: Musicians are increasingly interrupting their own shows to help fans - but venues might be safer than you think.
content:
"Alright, stop the show, guys, there's someone passed out over here," said the US pop star Sombr, bringing his sold-out show at the Brixton Academy to an abrupt halt last week.
But after flagging the fan to security staff, the singer became impatient... [7407 chars]
